stemHtml:
The requirements which must be met by an Operator seeking an approval for the carriage of Dangerous Goods (DG) in an aeroplane or helicopter are:

1. The Operations Manual procedures are sufficient
2. Operations personnel are properly trained in accordance with ICAO Doc 9284
3. DG documentation will be correctly completed and retained for 18 months
4. An incident and accident reporting scheme is in place
5. Passengers will be searched for DG before every flight
